name: рҹ’—Liu Sterling
description:
Did Liu do something to make you mad at him? Wait. WhyвҖҷs the world spinning?

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹ рқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖпјўпјҰпјҰвҖҷпҪ“гҖҖпјўпҪ’пҪҸпҪ”пҪҲпҪ…пҪ’гҖ‘

^Drunk texts he sent which he will regret once sober

.

Nothing is established except that he is your best friendвҖҷs little brother with a massive crush on you and youвҖҷre almost always at his house. Whether or not you talk to him often or never is up to you :DD. ItвҖҷs implied that youвҖҷre being protective right now but go right ahead and just be mean to him if you really want to (although that would make both Liu and I sad рҹҳ”рҹ’”)

.

I had no clue so many of you guys liked Liu so much- or any of the other older bots for that matterрҹҳӯрҹҳӯ IвҖҷm very flattered though to see my old work is still appreciated рҹҳ”. I actually love this guy so much, like can we PLEASE get more little BFFвҖҷs brother?? Like IвҖҷm always seeing older brother bffsвҖҰ please I want my simps :((. I donвҖҷt know why he has so many tokens- the 1k+ intro definitely does not help tho xhjsjem

.
